nasb.text: Tearing his clothes, the high priest *said, “What further need do we have of witnesses?

esv.text: And the high priest tore his garments and said, “What further witnesses do we need?

cnv.text: 大祭司就撕開自己的衣服，說：“我們還要甚麼證人呢？

ccb.text: 大祭司便撕裂衣服，说：“我们还需要什么证人呢？

csbs.text: 大祭司就撕裂自己的衣服，说：“难道我们还需要什么见证人吗？
